channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MIDWEST] Midwest Gold Ltd. Allots 4,50,750 Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
Midwest Gold Ltd. has approved the allotment of 4,50,750 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each at an issue price of Rs.2,000/- per share on a preferential basis. The allotment is made to various allottees under Promoter, Promoter Group, and Non-Promoter Public Categories. The equity shares so allotted will rank pari passu with the existing equity shares of the Company. The Company has received in-principle approval from BSE Limited for issuance of the aforesaid Equity Shares on preferential basis. The application for listing and trading approval of the Stock Exchange for the above equity shares will be made in due course. The issued and paid-up equity share capital of the Company stands increased from 1,20,47,946 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each to 1,24,98,696 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each fully paid up.

  • Midwest Gold Ltd. allots 4,50,750 equity shares on preferential basis
  • Allottees fall under Promoter, Promoter Group, and Non-Promoter Public Categories
  • Equity shares allotted at an issue price of Rs.2,000/- per share
  • Company received in-principle approval from BSE Limited for issuance
  • Issued and paid-up equity share capital of the Company increased to 1,24,98,696 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each fully paid up

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MIDWEST GOLD LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [MEDPLUS] Medplus Subsidiary Faces Three-Day Drug License Suspension in Telangana
item.description:
Medplus Health Services Ltd. announced that its subsidiary, Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, received a suspension order for a drug license of a store located in Telangana. The Assistant Director of Drugs Control Administration, Warangal, Telangana, issued the suspension order on March 28, 2026, under Rule 65 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940, and Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945. The store is situated on Parkal Main Road, and the suspension will last for three days, potentially causing a revenue loss of Rs 0.60 lacs.

  • Medplus Health Services Ltd. subsidiary, Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, received a suspension order for a drug license in Telangana.
  • The suspension is for a store located on Parkal Main Road and will last for three days.
  • The Assistant Director of Drugs Control Administration, Warangal, Telangana, issued the suspension order on March 28, 2026.
  • The suspension was issued under Rule 65 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940, and Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945.
  • The suspension may result in a potential revenue loss of Rs 0.60 lacs for the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Medplus Health Services Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [MFSL] Max Financial Services Independent Director, Mr. K. Narasimha Murthy, to Retire on Completion of Tenure
item.description:
Max Financial Services Ltd. announced that Mr. K. Narasimha Murthy, an Independent Director of the Company, will retire upon completion of his term on March 29, 2026. Mr. Murthy was initially appointed for a term of five years commencing from March 30, 2021, and was due for re-appointment for another five-year term. However, the shareholders did not approve the proposed re-appointment at the 37th Annual General Meeting held on September 18, 2025. The Board and Management have expressed gratitude for Mr. Murthy's contributions during his tenure.

  • Mr. K. Narasimha Murthy to retire as Independent Director of Max Financial Services Ltd.
  • Murthy's initial term was from March 30, 2021, to March 29, 2026.
  • Shareholders did not approve Murthy's re-appointment for a second term.
  • Murthy's re-appointment required a special resolution with 75% majority, but only received 66.77% votes in its favor.
  • Max Financial Services acknowledges Murthy's contributions during his association with the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Max Financial Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SETCO] Setco Automotive Ltd. to Sell Majority Stake in Subsidiary for INR 185 Crores, Awaits Further INR 255 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Setco Automotive Ltd. has approved the sale of a majority stake in its subsidiary, Setco Auto Systems Private Limited (SASPL), to RSB Transmissions (I) Limited for approximately INR 185 Crores. The transaction also includes the sale of remaining shares worth up to INR 255 Crores, subject to fulfillment of agreed performance parameters and achievement of EBITDA-linked milestones. The sale is expected to take place in the financial year 2027-28. Additionally, a non-compete agreement has been executed, with a non-compete consideration of INR 70 Crores.

  • Setco Automotive Ltd. to sell 41% stake in subsidiary, Setco Auto Systems Private Limited for approximately INR 185 Crores.
  • Balance 24% stake in SASPL to be sold for up to INR 255 Crores, subject to performance parameters and EBITDA-linked milestones.
  • Non-compete agreement executed with a non-compete consideration of INR 70 Crores.
  • Transaction to be completed in two phases: first phase in 2026, second phase in 2027-28.
  • Setco Automotive Ltd. and promoters to cease usage of 'Setco' brand/trade name.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SETCO AUTOMOTIVE LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [EPL] EPL Ltd. Announces Scheme of Amalgamation with Indovida India Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

EPL Ltd. has announced a scheme of amalgamation with Indovida India Private Limited. The amalgamation will be on a going concern basis and is subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals. The merger is expected to bring synergies and enhance the company's operations. The shareholders of Indovida India will receive equity shares of EPL Ltd. in accordance with the share exchange ratio stipulated in the Scheme.

  • EPL Ltd. to merge with Indovida India Private Limited
  • Merger to be on a going concern basis
  • Subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals
  • Shareholders of Indovida India to receive equity shares of EPL Ltd.
  • Expected to bring synergies and enhance operations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EPL Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [NLCINDIA] NLC India Ltd's Joint Venture Successfully Commences Coal Production from Pachwara South Coal Block
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NLC India Ltd's joint venture company, Neyveli Uttar Pradesh Power Limited (NUPPL), has successfully commenced coal production at the Pachwara South Open Cast Project in Dumka District, Jharkhand. The coal block, which was previously unexplored, has an extractable coal reserve of 264.84 million tonnes and a normative mining capacity of 9 million tonnes per annum. The project is part of the 3 x 660 MW Ghatampur Thermal Power Plant being established at Ghatampur, Uttar Pradesh. The Pachwara South Coal Block was allotted to NLC India Ltd by the Ministry of Coal, Government of India, in 2016, and NUPPL has fully explored the block through detailed drilling across the entire area.

  • NLC India Ltd's joint venture company, Neyveli Uttar Pradesh Power Limited (NUPPL), has commenced coal production at the Pachwara South Open Cast Project.
  • The Pachwara South Coal Block has an extractable coal reserve of 264.84 million tonnes and a normative mining capacity of 9 million tonnes per annum.
  • The coal block is part of the 3 x 660 MW Ghatampur Thermal Power Plant being established at Ghatampur, Uttar Pradesh.
  • The Pachwara South Coal Block was allotted to NLC India Ltd by the Ministry of Coal, Government of India, in 2016.
  • NUPPL has fully explored the coal block through detailed drilling across the entire area.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NLC India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DPABHUSHAN] D. P. Abhushan Ltd Opens 12th Store of D. P. Jewellers in Dhar, Madhya Pradesh
item.description:
D. P. Abhushan Ltd, a leading company in the jewellery industry, has announced the opening of a new showroom for its brand D. P. Jewellers at Dhar, Madhya Pradesh. The new retail showroom, which started its operations on March 29, 2026, will offer a wide range of jewellery products including Gold, Silver, Diamond studded Jewellery, Kundan, Polki and other premium varieties. This expansion is in line with the company's strategy to strengthen its presence in Tier-II cities and is not expected to have any material impact on the financials of the Company in the current fiscal year.

  • D. P. Abhushan Ltd opens 12th store of D. P. Jewellers in Dhar, Madhya Pradesh
  • New retail showroom offers a wide range of jewellery products
  • Expansion aligns with the company's strategy to strengthen its presence in Tier-II cities
  • No material impact on the financials of the Company in the current fiscal year
  • No capital expenditure approval from shareholders required

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: D.P. Abhushan Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [FOODSIN] Foods & Inns Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for 48 Hours After Q4 Results in 2025-26
item.description:
Foods & Inns Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from 1st April, 2026 until the end of 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the 4th quarter and financial year ended 2025-26 on 31st March, 2026. This move is in accordance with the company's 'Code for Fair Disclosure and Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading'.

  • Foods & Inns Ltd to close trading window for 48 hours after Q4 results in 2025-26
  • Closure affects all designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Trading window closure in accordance with the company's 'Code for Fair Disclosure and Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading'

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FOODS & INNS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GRINFRA] Promoter Group of G R Infraprojects Ltd Notifies Inter Se Transfer of Equity Shares
item.description:
The Promoter Group of G R Infraprojects Ltd has notified the company and the stock exchanges about the inter se transfer of equity shares among the qualifying persons (immediate relatives) under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations. The acquisition and disposal of shares by Shakuntala Devi Gupta and Manish Gupta did not result in any change in the aggregate shareholding and voting rights of the Promoter Group. The transaction occurred on 27th March 2026.

  • Promoter Group notifies inter se transfer of equity shares
  • Shakuntala Devi Gupta and Manish Gupta involved in the share transfer
  • No change in the aggregate shareholding and voting rights of the Promoter Group
  • Transaction occurred on 27th March 2026
  • Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations applicable

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: G R Infraprojects Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ELPROINTL] Elpro International Ltd Closes Trading Window Until After Q1 2026 Financial Results
item.description:
Elpro International Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with BSE Circular No. LIST/COMP/01/2019-20 dated April 2, 2019 and the company's Code of Internal Procedures and Conduct for regulating, monitoring, and reporting of Trading by Insiders. The trading window will remain closed from the start of trading hours of April 1, 2026, and will open after 48 hours of the announcement of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, will be intimated separately. Designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in the securities of the company during the aforesaid trading window closure period.

  • Elpro International Ltd closes trading window until after Q1 2026 financial results
  • Trading window to open after 48 hours of financial results announcement
  • Board Meeting date for financial results approval to be announced separately
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to deal in securities during closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELPRO INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
